item.title: SuperWin 2.0.0
item.description:
SuperWin 2.0.0

  • Blended, custom title bar that flows into the app's Mica surface.
  • New Settings page: app theme (light/dark/system), launch-at-sign-in, and clipboard options.
  • Clipboard (formerly Clipboard++): history is now captured process-wide, and the Win+Shift+V quick-picker works — search, pinned items, keyboard navigation, and auto-paste back into your app.
  • New tools: Keep Awake, Hash & Checksum (MD5/SHA-1/SHA-256), Network Info, and Unit Converter.

item.title: SuperWin 1.3.0
item.description:
SuperWin 1.3.0

  • Notepad Super is now a Word-Lite editor: font family & size, bold/italic/underline/strikethrough, text & highlight colors, alignment, bullet/numbered lists, undo/redo, and RTF open/save.
  • New Color Picker tool: full color wheel, hex/RGB with copy, and a screen eyedropper.
  • PowerToys-style dashboard (NavigationView + Mica), app icon, larger default window.
  • Volume Customizer, Clipboard++, and Diagnostics (with always-on-top mini-monitor).
